items.title: Amazon’s protein sale takes up to 40% off KIND, Quest, Premier Protein, deals from $5
items.summary:
Amazon is serving up a fresh batch of deals on protein bars, powders, shakes, and snacks from some of the biggest brands in the category. Right now you can score up to 40% off select favorites from KIND, Quest, C4, Premier Protein, ALOHA, Zbar, and more, with prices starting at just $5. Whether you’re stocking up on post-workout essentials or everyday grab-and-go snacks, now’s a great time to save.

Deal highlights:

  • Up to 41% off KIND protein bars and snacks
  • Up to 20% off Quest products
  • Up to 15% off Premier Protein shakes and snacks

Browse the full Amazon protein sale to see all of the available offers before they’re gone.

Top protein deals of the day:

  • C4 Whey Protein Powder, Hershey’s Chocolate – 25g Protein, 0g Added Sugar, 130 Calories Per Serving, Supports Muscle Recovery, 28 Servings, Premium Whey for Post-Workout $36 (Orig. $45)
  • KIND Protein MAX Bars Variety Pack, Gluten Free, Low Sugar, High Fiber Snacks, Sweet & Salty Caramel Peanut Crisp, Crispy Chocolate Peanut Butter, 20g Protein, 12 Count $17.50 (Orig. $26)

  • KIND Protein MAX Sweet & Salty Caramel Peanut Crisp Snack Bars, Keto Friendly, 20g Protein, 12 Count $18.50 (Orig. $22)
  • Biena Edamame Beans Snack High Protein Snacks – Healthy Office Snacks For Adults and Kids, 12g of Protein, 130 Low Calorie, Crunchy Edamame, Vegan, Low Carb, Gluten-Free 18 pk $19 (Orig. $24)
  • KIND Healthy Snacks Bars, Dark Chocolate Cherry Cashew, Gluten Free, High Fiber Snacks, 4g Protein, 12 Count $10 (Orig. $13)
  • The Only Bean High Protein Snacks, Healthy Office Snacks, Healthy Snacks for Adults and Kids for Lunch, Vegan, Low Carb & Gluten Free – Edamame Beans Snack, Variety Pack – 0.9oz (Pack of 45) $34 (Orig. $40)
  • Jack Link’s Original Beef Jerky Sticks – Made with 100% Real Beef – Ready to Eat Real Meat Protein Snacks – 5g Protein per Serving – 0.92 oz Meat Stick $14 (Orig. $17.50)

  • ALOHA Organic Plant-Based Protein Bars | Chocolate Fudge Brownie | Vegan, Gluten-Free, Paleo, Low-Carb, Non-GMO, Soy-Free, 12 Count $22 (Orig. $33)

  • Premier Protein Non-Dairy Plant Based Almondmilk Protein Shake, Chocolate, 20g Protein, 5g Sugar, Gluten-Free, 11.5 Fl oz (12 Pack) $23 (Orig. $27)
  • Orgain Organic Vegan Protein Powder, Cookies & Cream – 21g Plant Based Protein, 7g Prebiotic Fiber, Low Net Carb, No Lactose Ingredients, No Added Sugar, Non-GMO $25 (Orig. $38)

items.summary: Your Friday afternoon lineup of the best Android game and app deals has arrived, including titles like Foretales, Looking for Aliens, Serial Cleaner, Parabellum: Siege of Legends, FrogBoy, Zombie Night Terror, Final Fantasy VII, and more. Alongside the ongoing and rare price drop on the official Google Pixel Flex Dual Port 67W USB-C Fast Charger, we also have $300 price drops on Google Pixel 10 Pro and Galaxy Buds 4 Pro at up to $120 off, as well as Acer’s Chromebook Plus 516 laptop with Google AI down at $329. items.title: This 25W Baseus MagSafe power bank is a staple in my Apple EDC, now nearly 50% off at $42 low
items.summary: Courtesy of Baseus’ official Amazon storefront, you can now get its PicoGo AM52 10,000mAh Qi2.2 MagSafe power bank for $42.99 shipped. Be sure to enter promo code UTYJDF7V at checkout to see the discounted price. This model regularly sells for $80, so today’s deal takes $37 off and delivers a 46% discount. That marks the lowest price we’ve tracked for this particular version, which pairs 25W Qi2.2 wireless charging with a built-in 45W USB-C cable. We have seen the variant of this power bank without the Type-C cable go for less in the past, but this is the best price we’ve seen on this more convenient model. Head below for more details.

items.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
items.summary: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn’t be worse with the company reportedly eyeing an IPO […]

items.title: This 3-pack of heavy-duty nylon extension cable/hose straps with metal grommets now just $5
items.summary:
Lamicall 3-pack Heavy-Duty Extension Cord Storage Straps

Buy for $5 (Reg. $12)

Apply NLONU973 during checkout.

What we love

There are loads of more delicate straps and organization solutions for all of your indoor charging cables and EDC needs, but sometimes you need something more robust for extension cables and outdoor power cables, and even hoses. And if you do, I really like the 55-pound capacity, nylon build, and rustproof metal grommets here – especially at $5 for three different sizes.

items.title: Cover storm cleanup, firewood, pruning, more with Greenworks’ 24V 12-inch cordless electric compact chainsaw down at $129
items.summary: Over at Amazon, you can find the popular Greenworks 24V 12-inch Brushless Cordless Compact Electric Chainsaw with 4.0Ah battery at $129 shipped, beating out the direct Greenworks website by $14. While it carries a $200 MSRP, at Amazon, we haven’t really seen it go higher than $179 lately, while discounts have mostly dropped the costs to $150 and $143, though there have been recent falls to $129, as well as $126 and $120 back during Prime Day. The deal here cuts $50 off the going rate ($71 off the MSRP) landing it just $9 above the June Prime Day 2026 low. There’s tons of other Greenworks tool deals in the official Amazon storefront here.
